Module org.kink_lang.kink
Package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir

Class OverriddenControlGenerator

java.lang.Object
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir.OverriddenControlGenerator
All Implemented Interfaces:
ControlGenerator
public class OverriddenControlGenerator extends Object implements ControlGenerator
Generates insns for controls for the case when intrinsic implementations cannot be used.
